title: Azbrian

'''Azbrian''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural world]] of sweeping plains and grasslands, dotted with [[Farm/Legends|farms]] that raised the eight-legged herd animals known as [[dray beast]]s. One such farm was owned by [[Condren Foreck]], a potential suitor to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].
It played a minor part in the Yuuzhan Vong War as a base for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]/[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. After the war the Galactic Alliance abandoned the base. It was never a part of the Alliance until after the war. The Prime Minister of the planet decided to join the Alliance, so he sent two senators to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the [[Galactic Alliance Senate]]. The planet turned out to be valuable during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] and ''[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' misspell the planet as "Azbian." ''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' confirm the correct spelling as "Azbrian." Additionally, ''Rebellion'' places Azbian in the [[Jospro sector/Legends|Jospro sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
